Step 3: ((🫑 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ 🧿) = (🧿 ⊕ 🧿)    [by ⊕ table]

Step 4: (🧿 ⊕ 🧿) = 🫑    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🫑

Step 4: (🐙 ⊕ (🐌 ⊕ (🐌 ⊕ 🐌))) = (🐙 ⊕ (🐌 ⊕ 🐌))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 5: (🐙 ⊕ (🐌 ⊕ 🐌)) = (🐙 ⊕ 🐌)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🐙 ⊕ 🐌) = 🪸    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪸

Step 3: (🥟 ⊕ (🦔 ⊕ (🐙 ⊕ 🥟))) = (🥟 ⊕ (🦔 ⊕ 🥟))    [by ⊕ table]

Step 4: (🥟 ⊕ (🦔 ⊕ 🥟)) = (🥟 ⊕ 🐙)    [by ⊕ table]

Step 5: (🥟 ⊕ 🐙) = 🐙    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🐙

Step 4: (🥟 ⊕ (🪼 ⊕ (🪼 ⊕ 🪼))) = (🥟 ⊕ (🪼 ⊕ 🥟))    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 5: (🥟 ⊕ (🪼 ⊕ 🥟)) = (🥟 ⊕ 🪈)    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 6: (🥟 ⊕ 🪈) = 🪈    [by ⊕ table]  

Final Output: 🪈

Step 3: ((🥟 ⊕ 🐌) ⊕ (🧿 ⊕ 🐌)) = (🧿 ⊕ (🧿 ⊕ 🐌))    [by ⊕ table]

Step 4: (🧿 ⊕ (🧿 ⊕ 🐌)) = (🧿 ⊕ 🧿)    [by ⊕ table]

Step 5: (🧿 ⊕ 🧿) = 🧿    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🧿

Step 4: (🦔 ⊕ (🪨 ⊕ (🦔 ⊕ 🦔))) = (🦔 ⊕ (🪨 ⊕ 🪨))    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 5: (🦔 ⊕ (🪨 ⊕ 🪨)) = (🦔 ⊕ 🦔)    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 6: (🦔 ⊕ 🦔) = 🪨    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪨

Step 3: (🍄 ⊕ (🪭 ⊕ 🍄)) = (🍄 ⊕ 🪭)    [by ⊕ table]

Step 4: (🍄 ⊕ 🪭) = 🍄    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🍄

Step 3: ((🥟 ⊕ 🫑) ⊕ 🪤) = (🥟 ⊕ 🪤)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 4: (🥟 ⊕ 🪤) = 🫑    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🫑

Step 3: (🧲 ⊕ (🐙 ⊕ 🥟)) = (🧲 ⊕ 🥟)    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 4: (🧲 ⊕ 🥟) = 🐙    [by ⊕ table]  

Final Output: 🐙

Step 4: (🪼 ⊕ (🫧 ⊕ (🧄 ⊕ 🫧))) = (🪼 ⊕ (🫧 ⊕ 🪼))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 5: (🪼 ⊕ (🫧 ⊕ 🪼)) = (🪼 ⊕ 🪼)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🪼 ⊕ 🪼) = 🧄    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🧄

Step 3: (🪺 ⊕ (🧶 ⊕ 🪺)) = (🪺 ⊕ 🧶)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 4: (🪺 ⊕ 🧶) = 🧶    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🧶

Step 4: (🦩 ⊕ ((🦩 ⊕ 🫑) ⊕ 🦩)) = (🦩 ⊕ (🪆 ⊕ 🦩))    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 5: (🦩 ⊕ (🪆 ⊕ 🦩)) = (🦩 ⊕ 🪆)    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 6: (🦩 ⊕ 🪆) = 🫑    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🫑

Step 5: (🪣 ⊕ (inv(🧊) ⊕ inv(🧊))) = (🪣 ⊕ (🪣 ⊕ inv(🧊)))    [by inv]  
Step 6: (🪣 ⊕ (🪣 ⊕ inv(🧊))) = (🪣 ⊕ (🪣 ⊕ 🪣))    [by inv]  
Step 7: (🪣 ⊕ (🪣 ⊕ 🪣)) = (🪣 ⊕ 🪣)    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 8: (🪣 ⊕ 🪣) = 🪣    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪣

Step 5: (🧿 ⊗ inv(🫧)) = (🧿 ⊗ 🪤)    [by inv]
Step 6: (🧿 ⊗ 🪤) = ((🧿 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ 🪤)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 7: ((🧿 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ 🪤) = (🪨 ⊕ 🪤)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🪨 ⊕ 🪤) = 🫧    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🫧

Step 4: (inv(🪺) ⊕ inv((🫑 ⊕ 🐙))) = (🍄 ⊕ inv((🫑 ⊕ 🐙)))    [by inv]  
Step 5: (🍄 ⊕ inv((🫑 ⊕ 🐙))) = (🍄 ⊕ inv(🐙))    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 6: (🍄 ⊕ inv(🐙)) = (🍄 ⊕ 🪺)    [by inv]  
Step 7: (🍄 ⊕ 🪺) = 🍄    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🍄

Step 5: inv((🧊 ⊗ 🧿)) = inv(((🧊 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ 🧊))    [by definition of ⊗]

Step 6: inv(((🧊 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ 🧊)) = inv((🧿 ⊕ 🧊))    [by ⊕ table]

Step 7: inv((🧿 ⊕ 🧊)) = inv(🧿)    [by ⊕ table]

Step 8: inv(🧿) = 🧶    [by inv]

Final Output: 🧶

Step 4: ((🦔 ⊗ (🦔 ⊕ 🫑)) ⊕ inv(🪼)) = ((🦔 ⊗ 🪼) ⊕ inv(🪼))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 5: ((🦔 ⊗ 🪼) ⊕ inv(🪼)) = ((🦔 ⊗ 🪼) ⊕ 🦔)    [by inv]
Step 6: ((🦔 ⊗ 🪼) ⊕ 🦔) = ((inv(🦔 ⊕ 🪼)) ⊕ 🦔)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 7: ((inv(🦔 ⊕ 🪼)) ⊕ 🦔) = ((inv(🪼)) ⊕ 🦔)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: ((inv(🪼)) ⊕ 🦔) = (🦔 ⊕ 🦔)    [by inv]
Step 9: (🦔 ⊕ 🦔) = 🪸    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪸

Step 6: (🐌 ⊗ (🧊 ⊕ inv(🫑))) = (🐌 ⊗ (🧊 ⊕ 🪨))    [by inv]  
Step 7: (🐌 ⊗ (🧊 ⊕ 🪨)) = (🐌 ⊗ 🫑)    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 8: (🐌 ⊗ 🫑) = inv((🐌 ⊕ 🫑))    [by definition of ⊗]  
Step 9: inv((🐌 ⊕ 🫑)) = inv(🪨)    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 10: inv(🪨) = 🫑    [by inv]  

Final Output: 🫑

Step 4: (inv(🌵) ⊕ inv(inv(🥟))) = (🥟 ⊕ inv(inv(🥟)))    [by transformation inv]  
Step 5: (🥟 ⊕ inv(inv(🥟))) = (🥟 ⊕ inv(🐌))    [by transformation inv]  
Step 6: (🥟 ⊕ inv(🐌)) = (🥟 ⊕ 🌵)    [by transformation inv]  
Step 7: (🥟 ⊕ 🌵) = 🥟    [by ⊕ table]  

Final Output: 🥟

Step 6: (🪻 ⊛ ((🪵 ⊕ 🪵) ⊕ 🐙)) = (🪻 ⊛ (🪈 ⊕ 🐙))    [by ⊕ table]

Step 7: (🪻 ⊛ (🪈 ⊕ 🐙)) = (🪻 ⊛ 🪻)    [by ⊕ table]

Step 8: (🪻 ⊛ 🪻) = inv(🪻 ⊕ 🪻)    [by definition of ⊛]

Step 9: inv(🪻 ⊕ 🪻) = inv(🪵)    [by ⊕ table]

Step 10: inv(🪵) = 🪻    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪻

Step 6: (🥟 ⊕ (🪺 ⊕ (🥟 ⊛ 🪩))) = (🥟 ⊕ (🪺 ⊕ inv(🥟 ⊗ 🪩)))    [by definition of ⊛]

Step 7: (🥟 ⊕ (🪺 ⊕ inv(🥟 ⊗ 🪩))) = (🥟 ⊕ (🪺 ⊕ inv(🥟)))    [by ⊗ table]

Step 8: (🥟 ⊕ (🪺 ⊕ inv(🥟))) = (🥟 ⊕ (🪺 ⊕ 🪩))    [by inv]

Step 9: (🥟 ⊕ (🪺 ⊕ 🪩)) = (🥟 ⊕ 🫧)    [by ⊕ table]

Step 10: (🥟 ⊕ 🫧) = 🪩    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪩
